sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
before_hashes = {b['hash']: b for b in before}

        print(f"NEW: id={an['id']}, color={an['color']}, pixels={an['pixels']}")
    elif bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
        print(f"CHANGED: id={an['id']}, color={an['color']}, before={bn['pixels']}, after={an['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
